primary_text:
I have skipped a vet appointment because I was worried about the cost. I am not proud of it, but I know I am not the only one.

76% of Australian pet owners worry about affording vet care. Not because vets are expensive. Because you never know what it will cost.

Best for Pet: $50/month. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: I skipped a vet visit because of the cost.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. No more skipping.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Honest, confessional tone. Photo of person holding pet with soft eye contact. Warm palette.
